top_signals.title: Trump imposing 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods over alleged trade discrimination
top_signals.summary: Canada's relationship with the U.S. has frayed amid Trump's tariff-heavy agenda and vocal displeasure with the nations' trilateral trade pact with Mexico.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cabinet approves Japan economic blueprint with BOJ independence stressed
top_signals.summary: A line in a draft of the blueprint that had suggested a weakening of central bank autonomy has been rewritten in the final version.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump announces directives to strengthen domestic aluminum, critical mineral production
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump on July 20 signed two directives aimed at bolstering domestic aluminum production and securing critical mineral supply chains. The move comes as the Trump administration has focused on reshoring domestic production for critical minerals and reducing reliance on trading partners for key components.
